caption: A woman with long dreadlocks wears an orange basketball jersey with "Phoenix" and the number "42" printed on the front, along with a "Payrolls" logo. She has visible tattoos on her shoulders and arms and wears a purple compression sleeve on her right arm. She stands on a basketball court, gesturing with her hands open and palms facing forward. Behind her and to the right, another woman with long dark hair in braids, wearing a white jersey with blue and yellow accents, is partially visible. The background shows a blurred crowd of spectators in a sports arena. Throughout the sequence, the woman in the orange jersey maintains a focused expression while gesturing, and there is very little movement between the frames, showing her in a consistent position and pose as she interacts with someone off-screen.
